globalNews.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
globalNews.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

globalNews.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
globalNews.summary: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

globalNews.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
globalNews.summary: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.

globalNews.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
globalNews.summary: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

globalNews.title: eBay rejects $55.5bn offer from GameStop
globalNews.summary: The online auction giant said it doubted how the video game retailer would finance its offer.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin digests highest US CPI since 2023 as Fed rate hike woes return
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin showed fresh signs of volatility as US CPI inflation saw new multiyear highs on oil price hikes thanks to the US-Iran war.

cryptoNews.title: LMAX Group launches digital asset collateral solution for institutions
cryptoNews.summary: The new portal lets LMAX clients deposit digital assets into custody and use them as collateral to trade FX, metals, CFDs, perpetual futures and crypto.

cryptoNews.title: Exodus sells over 1,000 Bitcoin as Q1 loss widens to $32M
cryptoNews.summary: Exodus Movement reported a $32.1 million net loss in Q1, with revenue down 36.8% to $22.7 million amid a drop in monthly active users.

cryptoNews.title: North Korea ‘industrialized’ crypto theft, laundered billions: CertiK
cryptoNews.summary: North Korea-linked hackers stole about $2.06 billion of the $3.4 billion lost in crypto hacks in 2025 and are moving from phishing to physical infiltration, CertiK’s new report finds.

aiNews.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
aiNews.summary: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

aiNews.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
aiNews.summary: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

aiNews.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
aiNews.summary: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input a

aiNews.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
aiNews.summary: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

aiNews.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
aiNews.summary: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.
